import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn second_token(_ line: String) -> Option<String>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
  end
  if i == n
    return None
  end
  mut start = i - 1
  mut j = start
  while j < n
    match string.byte_at(line, j)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        j = n + 1
      else
        j = j + 1
      end
    when None
      j = n
    end
  end
  if j <= n
    return None
  end
  mut k = j - 1
  while k < n
    match string.byte_at(line, k)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        k = k + 1
      else
        k = n + 1
      end
    when None
      k = n
    end
  end
  if k == n
    return None
  end
  let tok_start = k - 1
  mut e = tok_start
  while e < n
    match string.byte_at(line, e)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        e = n + 100
      else
        e = e + 1
      end
    when None
      e = n
    end
  end
  let tok_end = if e >= n + 50
    e - 100
  else
    n
  end
  Some(string.substring(line, tok_start, tok_end))
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      match second_token(line)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          total = total + v
        when None
          total = total
        end
      when None
        total = total
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  println("sum=#{total}")
end
